summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Open security-sensitive linked refs are routed to central security handling; closed candidate PRs are kept closed; remaining PRs are kept for their own maintainer review path unless a specific proof or technical-correctness decision needs human judgment.
